name: capstoneprojectii
description: This project is a Financial News Sentiment Analyzer designed to scrape financial news articles, summarize their content, and evaluate the potential market impact on specific companies. It leverages a local Large Language Model (LLM), specifically a fine-tuned version of Llama 3.1 (`fin-llama3.1-8b`), to perform advanced natural language processing tasks tailored for the financial domain.
